final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original editorial photo of a tropical resort infinity pool scene overlooking the ocean (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a tropical vacation aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include infinity pool edge merging with the ocean horizon, lounge chairs and parasols in frame, coconut palms framing the scene
Subject: must include the infinity pool, ocean view, lounge chairs, parasols, coconut trees
Scene/backdrop: must include open ocean horizon, blue sky with white clouds
Lighting/mood: needs a bright, sun-drenched vacation atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a high-saturation, vivid tropical direction — exact hues and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid:
